description: Comprehensive error catalog for metadata validation system

REQUIRED_FIELD_MISSING.description: A required field specified in the JSON Schema is missing from the metadata
REQUIRED_FIELD_MISSING.resolution: Add the required field to the YAML frontmatter. Refer to the schema documentation for required fields.

examples.fix: Add '---\ndescription: Your description here\n---' to the top of the file

TYPE_MISMATCH.description: The data type of a field does not match the expected type in the schema
TYPE_MISMATCH.resolution: Ensure the field value matches the expected type (string, number, boolean, array, or object)

ENUM_VIOLATION.description: The field value is not one of the allowed enumeration values
ENUM_VIOLATION.resolution: Use one of the allowed values specified in the schema

examples.error: Value 'INVALID_STATUS' is not in allowed values: DRAFT, ACTIVE, DEPRECATED, ARCHIVED, REVIEW, PENDING, SUPERSEDED

PATTERN_MISMATCH.description: The field value does not match the required pattern (regex)
PATTERN_MISMATCH.resolution: Ensure the value conforms to the specified pattern format

MIN_LENGTH_VIOLATION.description: The string value is shorter than the minimum allowed length
MIN_LENGTH_VIOLATION.resolution: Provide a value that meets the minimum length requirement

examples.error: Value length (5) is less than minimum (10)
examples.fix: Expand 'description: Short' to a minimum of 10 characters

MAX_LENGTH_VIOLATION.description: The string value exceeds the maximum allowed length
MAX_LENGTH_VIOLATION.resolution: Shorten the value to meet the maximum length requirement

examples.fix: Reduce description to 500 characters or less

MIN_ITEMS_VIOLATION.description: The array has fewer items than the minimum required
MIN_ITEMS_VIOLATION.resolution: Add more items to the array to meet the minimum requirement

MAX_ITEMS_VIOLATION.description: The array has more items than the maximum allowed
MAX_ITEMS_VIOLATION.resolution: Remove items to meet the maximum requirement

examples.fix: Reduce the number of tags to 20 or fewer

UNIQUE_ITEMS_VIOLATION.description: The array contains duplicate items when uniqueness is required
UNIQUE_ITEMS_VIOLATION.resolution: Remove duplicate items from the array

UNKNOWN_FIELD.description: A field is present in the metadata but not defined in the schema
UNKNOWN_FIELD.resolution: Remove the unknown field or add it to the schema if intentional

examples.error: Field 'customField' is not defined in schema

NO_METADATA.description: No YAML frontmatter found in the document
NO_METADATA.resolution: Add YAML frontmatter between '---' delimiters at the top of the file

examples.fix:
Add at the top of file:
---
description: Your description
---

INVALID_DATE_FORMAT.description: Date value does not conform to ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)
INVALID_DATE_FORMAT.resolution: Use ISO 8601 date format with zero-padded month and day

INVALID_SEMVER.description: Version value does not conform to Semantic Versioning 2.0.0
INVALID_SEMVER.resolution: Use semantic versioning format: MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH with optional pre-release and build metadata

examples.fix: Change to '1.0.0' (no 'v' prefix, three components required)

INVALID_GLOB_PATTERN.description: The applyTo field contains an invalid glob pattern
INVALID_GLOB_PATTERN.resolution: Use valid glob syntax with wildcards (*, **, ?) and path separators

EXPIRY_DATE_PASSED.description: The document's expiry date has passed
EXPIRY_DATE_PASSED.resolution: Review the document and update the expiry date or archive the document

DEPRECATED_FIELD.description: A field is deprecated and scheduled for removal in future schema versions
DEPRECATED_FIELD.resolution: Migrate to the recommended replacement field

Schema Violation.description: Errors related to missing or incorrect schema structure

Data Type.description: Errors related to incorrect data types

Value Constraint.description: Errors related to value constraints (enum, range, etc.)

Format Validation.description: Errors related to format patterns (regex, dates, versions)

Length Constraint.description: Errors related to string or array length constraints

ERROR.description: Critical issues that must be fixed

WARNING.description: Issues that should be reviewed but don't block validation

solutions: Validate YAML syntax with a YAML linter
Ensure all strings with special characters are quoted
Check for unescaped colons in values

causes: Frontmatter not at start of file
solutions: Ensure frontmatter starts with '---' on line 1
Ensure frontmatter ends with '---' followed by blank line
Remove any content before the first '---'
Validate only changed files in CI/CD
